subcodes.first_line: His is the grace and munificence, His the loving-kindness and bestowal. He giveth and withholdeth, for verily He is the All-Powerful, doing whatsoever He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: له الفضل و الجود و له العنایه و العطاء یعطی و یمنع انه هو المقتدر ما یشاء لا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
